new_classes.definition_en: Concentrated grape must (other than partially fermented grape must), classified under CN code 22043092 (subheading 2204 30), subject to the conditions of additional note 7 to Chapter 22 of the Combined Nomenclature.

coverage_explanation: The main distinguishing criterion captured is: (1) this is a concentrated grape must under subheading 2204 30, code 22043092, as a sibling of PartiallyFermentedGrapeMust (22043010) and disjoint from it. However, the legal text references "additional note 7 to this chapter" which provides the specific technical definition of what counts as "concentrated" grape must (e.g. density thresholds, Brix levels, or sugar content thresholds). Since the content of additional note 7 is not provided in the legal text supplied, the precise quantitative or qualitative criteria that make a grape must "concentrated" in the CN sense cannot be axiomatised. A `fermentationArrestedByAlcohol` or sugar-concentration property restriction would be required to fully capture the note 7 criteria, but their values are unknown without the note text. Coverage is therefore partial.
